questions.questionText: 栄養の偏りをなくし、十分な睡眠をとって、<u>潤い</u>のある生活をしましょう。
questions.explanation: 潤い is read as うるおい (moisture, richness, charm). いきおい (勢い) means momentum. いこい (憩い) means rest or relaxation. うれい (憂い) means sorrow or grief.

questions.questionText: 面接で＿＿＿＿＿しないように、十分な準備をしましょう。
questions.explanation: おどおど means 'nervously' or 'timidly', which fits contextually: 'so that you don\'t act nervously during the interview'. ぼつぼつ means little by little. まるまる means completely. わざわざ means intentionally / going out of one\'s way.

questions.questionText: 国民の信頼＿＿＿＿＿、政権は維持できない。
questions.explanation: 〜なくしては...ない means 'without ~ cannot...'. 'Without the trust of the citizens, the administration cannot be maintained.' をとわず means regardless of. をもとにして means based on. からこそ means precisely because.
